title: ornithogalum magnum
intro: Ornithogalum magnum, also known as the Star of Bethlehem or Resurrection Lily, is a perennial plant in the lily family that blooms in late winter or early spring. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ornithogalum magnum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antiviral and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum magnum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
